title: Gooey British Gluten-Free Quinoa Stir-fry
description: A fresh and energizing dish featuring a red wine jelly base, gluten-free quinoa, and other flavorful ingredients to create a unique and delicious meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Rinse quinoa under cold water and drain well.
In a saucepan, bring quinoa and water or broth to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for about 18 minutes until liquid is absorbed. Let it cool completely before using.
Heat olive oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add chopped celery, onion, and bell pepper; sauté for about 5 minutes until soft.
Stir in minced garlic, tomato sauce, red wine jelly, and cooked quinoa. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as a warm appetizer or side dish.
